title: 555 PCS Water Balloons, Rapid-Filling Self-Sealing Colorful Water Bombs, Water Balloons for Kids, Vibrant Colors, Eco-Friendly, for Summer Fun Outdoor Toys
features: Self Sealing Quick Fill Water Balloons: Enjoy the joy of water balloons. Water balloon filling and knotting are no longer cumbersome. Experience ultimate convenience with our rapid-fill feature, allowing you to fill and tie 555 water balloons in just 10 seconds. If the water is too full, the balloon bursts easily

Biodegradable water balloons: These water balloons Water bombs are made of biodegradable natural latex material, of good quality, which is very flexible, not easy to break, odourless, and safe. You can give these water balloons for kids, No need to worry about any security issues

Vibrant Colors: This water balloon set, with a large quantity, multiple colors, and safe material, is very suitable as a gift for your friends and family, they will be very happy after receiving the gift, perfect for service at birthday parties, summer BBQs, and any outdoor gathering where colorful fun is desired

Water balloons for kids easy fill: After injecting water into the water balloon, pick up the whole bunch and shake it, it will fall off automatically, and the rubber band on the top will automatically tighten to prevent water leakage. It is extremely fast. It is best to place water balloons filled with water in a bucket filled with water so that they last the longest and do not break on the floor

For young and old: Our self sealing water balloons are perfect for outdoor parties in summer. Guaranteed water fun for young and old. Water balloons self sealing the perfect toy For pool parties, beach parties, picnics, patio activities, outdoor water battles and summer events. It is suitable for adults and children to play together
